description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- feat(crash-report): D1 retention purge, ingest sentinel, graceful write degradation / 崩溃统计 D1:自动清理 + 写入哨兵 + 摄入降级 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6420
- fix(serve): keep transcript scrollable during streaming output / 修复网页版流式输出期间无法向上滚动查看历史内容 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6426
- fix(desktop): performance popup resume false positives and copy reliability / 修复性能弹窗恢复期误报与复制可靠性 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6424
- fix(desktop): add accent colour underline to active tab / 选中 tab 底部增加主题色条 by @JesonChou in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6416
- fix(agent): stop delivery sub-agent readiness failure cascade / 修复交付模式子 agent readiness 失败级联 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6421
- fix(cli): make --dir explicitly set workspace root instead of falling back to git-root detection by @SauronSkywalker in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6283
- Clarify AppChrome tab boundaries / 增强顶部标签页视觉分隔 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6433
- Align CLI interactions with Claude Code / 对齐 Claude Code CLI 交互 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6431
- feat(registry): reject unresolvable publish sources at the schema by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6442
- fix(registry): reject bare package-name sources for kind=skill by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6444
- fix(cli): 修复 Windows 上 chooser 自由文本模式下宽字符输入的重绘问题 by @billycat in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6394
- fix(mcp): Quarantine invalid tool schemas / 隔离无效 MCP 工具 Schema by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6449
- fix(agent): Let plans reach approval before delivery readiness / 让计划先完成审批再执行交付检查 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6458
- feat(desktop): add dynamic external opener menu / 添加动态外部应用打开菜单 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6457
- fix(cli): support mouse selection in composer by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6456
- fix(desktop): Make classic tabbar whitespace draggable / 经典标签栏空白区支持拖动窗口 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6463
- fix(cli): recognize shell-escaped pasted image paths by @h4rk8s in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6060
- Add selected chat text and workspace code to the composer / 将聊天选区与工作区代码选区添加到输入区 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6454
- feat(agent): streamline prompts and Economy tools / 精简提示词与轻量工具面 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6461
- fix(desktop): keep WebView2 scale correct after restore / 修复 Windows 混合 DPI 恢复缩放 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6472
- fix(cli): support shell-escaped Windows paths / 支持 Windows Shell 转义路径 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6469
- Drain bot stop races and quote selection paths / 修复 bot 停止竞态、QQ 网关排空与选区路径引用 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6470
- Fix Goal + Delivery + YOLO lifecycle integration / 修复目标、交付与 YOLO 组合生命周期 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6467
- feat(desktop): refine classic sidebar sorting, previews, and topic actions / 经典侧栏：排序、预览与会话操作 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6468
- fix(desktop): keep pending plan approval visible across session switches / 修复切换会话后待确认审批不显示 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6432
- fix(desktop): prevent double-click race on topic archive (#6312) by @myipanta in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6404
- Expose independent ACP session axes / 拆分 ACP 会话三轴 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6438
- Add Claude plugin compatibility / 增加 Claude 插件兼容支持 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6434
- Show pinned conversations in classic sidebar / 经典侧边栏独立显示置顶会话 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6494
- fix(agent): imperative zh reasoning-language block / 强化中文思考语言注入措辞 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6500
- Add offline recovery Guard and Safe Mode / 增加离线恢复守卫与安全模式 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6460
- fix(agent): enforce serial todo progress / 强制串行 Todo 推进 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6497
- fix(agent): Ground edits without forced rereads / 无需强制重读即可同步编辑 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6504
- chore(sandbox): Retire the Windows native backend / 退役 Windows 原生沙箱后端 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6516
- feat(mcp): Trusted execution, signed catalog, and isolation / MCP 可信执行、签名目录与隔离 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6482
- fix(agent): Unify strict read-only subagent boundaries / 统一严格只读子代理边界 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6498
- Harden release-critical provider and credential paths / 加固发版关键 Provider 与凭据路径 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6536
- Harden NSIS setup for release workflows / 加固 NSIS 发版安装 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6537
- Bound bot lock stress test on Windows / 限制 Windows Bot 锁压力测试 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6540
- Fix Delivery recovery and isolate concurrent writers / 修复交付恢复与并发写入隔离 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6542
- Isolate all stored credential env keys / 隔离所有已保存凭据环境变量 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6544
New Contributors
- @billycat made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6394
- @h4rk8s made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6060
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.12...desktop-v1.17.13
